title: Simply Performance
description: Improve Minecraft with shaders and performance with this easy modpack. 1.20.4 stable!
body:
# **SET FABRIC TO VERSION 0.15.7**


Simply Performance is faster than other performance modpacks, because there are **NO** QOL features at all. The mods have been selected to be ONLY performance boosting and Optifine Features


### **Works everywhere**
Simply Performance does not include content mods, so you can play on any world or server.


### **Built on Fabric**



Simply Performance uses the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of mods. You can use the modpack to add any mods I did not include.

Simply Performance insures buttery smooth transitions, quick chunk loading, And high fps.

# **Unprecedented Optimization**
SP is meticulously designed to push the boundaries of optimization, delivering unparalleled performance gains. Experience smoother gameplay, reduced lag, and insanely faster loading times that will enhance your game experience.
# **Unbelievable FPS Boosts**
Get ready for an overkill of FPS gains. With advanced optimization mods and their large level of configuration, SP lets you squeeze every drop of performance out of your minecraft, providing an unparalleled boost to your FPS that goes beyond what you thought possible.


### **F.A.Q**
• Does SP work with Forge? 
No, SP is exclusive to Fabric.

• Does it change the game itself?
No! SP doesn't modify the Vanilla experience and is only focused on performance optimization.

• Does SP support Shaders?
Absolutely! With the Iris mod, SP supports almost every shader pack made for OptiFine.

• What mods are Included?
SP currently includes 45 optimization mods. Click on versions to see the mods.

• Is SP available on other platforms?
SP is exsclusive on Modrinth.
• Does SP have Optifines features?
Yes! SP has most, if not all of Optifines features.

Enjoy!
